general.title: Carbon Footprint Tracker SaaS
general.desc: A full-stack SaaS application that calculates personal and organizational carbon footprints. Users log activities (transport, energy, food, purchases), the system applies GHG Protocol emission factors, stores data in PostgreSQL, and generates interactive dashboards with reduction recommendations. Includes Scope 1/2/3 breakdown, benchmarking, and exportable sustainability reports.

niches.name: Energy & Grid
niches.tagline: Microgrid optimization, smart grid analytics, renewable forecasting
niches.title: Renewable Energy Microgrid Optimizer
niches.desc: A platform that models hybrid renewable energy microgrids (solar, wind, battery storage) using HOMER and SAM data. Users input location and load profiles, the system runs optimization to find the lowest LCOE configuration, and provides real-time monitoring of grid performance with weather-adjusted forecasting.

niches.name: Supply Chain
niches.tagline: Supply chain emissions tracking, Scope 3 accounting, supplier engagement
niches.title: Supply Chain Carbon Auditor
niches.desc: An enterprise tool for tracking and reducing Scope 3 supply chain emissions. Integrates with procurement systems, calculates product-level carbon footprints using Ecoinvent data, identifies high-emission suppliers, and generates decarbonization roadmaps with ROI projections for reduction strategies.

niches.name: Environmental Monitoring
niches.tagline: IoT sensor networks, air/water quality, real-time environmental alerts
niches.title: Environmental Sensor Network Platform
niches.desc: A distributed IoT platform that collects air and water quality data from citizen-deployed sensors. Features real-time monitoring dashboards, anomaly detection, pollution source identification, automated alerts, and open data APIs for researchers and policymakers.
